nodes.label: T3 — Instrument Home + Bottom Tab Bar

properties.purpose: Design spec showing the S2 My Orders screen combined with bottom tab bar integration, plus tab bar anatomy and states

properties.new_order_style: filled-accent block (solid blue), no pill, no shadow
properties.sync_state_indicator: amber status square when phone-local orders are unsent; clears when all pushed
properties.tab_height: 70px bar, hairline top, whole cells ≥48px targets
properties.hides_during: order-taking flow (replaced by back arrow + sticky Review bar)

nodes.label: S2 My Orders Screen with Bottom Tab Bar

properties.screen_label: S2 - My Orders — with bottom tab bar
properties.offline_banner: Saved on phone — not submitted yet / PENDING · WILL RETRY WHEN ONLINE · NO DUPLICATE

nodes.label: Instrument Design System — Tab Bar Rules

properties.status_language: flat status tag with leading square-swatch (same as chips)
properties.accent_usage: single filled-accent block for primary CTA (New Order); accent used as top-rule for active tab
properties.floating_elements: no floating pills, no shadows on tab bar
properties.design_principle: reads as one instrument surface — same square-swatch status language as chips, same restraint on accent
